tool.name: dependency_auditor
tool.description: Audit project dependencies for known security vulnerabilities.
tool.details: Common Use Cases: - Check a specific package version for vulnerabilities - Audit dependencies from package files (package.json, requirements.txt, pom.xml) - Verify if a specific version is vulnerable - List supported package ecosystems - Get CVE details for vulnerable dependencies

parameter.name: action
parameter.description: The audit action to perform: - audit_package: Check a specific package version - audit_file: Audit dependencies from a file - check_version: Check if a specific version is vulnerable - list_ecosystems: List supported package ecosystems

parameter.name: package_name
parameter.description: Name of the package to audit. Required for audit_package, check_version.

parameter.name: version
parameter.description: Version of the package. Required for audit_package, check_version.

parameter.name: file_content
parameter.description: Content of dependency file to audit. Required for audit_file.

parameter.name: file_type
parameter.description: Type of file: package.json, requirements.txt, pom.xml. Required for audit_file.

returns.description: Audit results including vulnerabilities found with CVE IDs, severity, and recommendations

tool.examples:
# Audit a specific package
audit_package express 4.17.0
# Check if version is vulnerable
check_version lodash 4.17.0
# List supported ecosystems
list_ecosystems
# Audit from file content
audit_file {"dependencies": {"express": "4.17.0"}} package.json
